name: Honey Whole Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine to the temperature and settings recommended by your machine's manufacturer.
2. Place all ingredients in the bread machine bowl in the order specified by your machine's instructions.
3. Close the lid securely.
4. Select the desired baking setting on your bread machine.
5. Press the "Start" button to begin mixing and kneading the dough.
6. Allow the machine to complete the baking cycle.
7. Once finished, carefully remove the baked loaf from the machine and let it cool before slicing.
